---
title: "Daiyu Guan"
image: images/daiyu_guan.jpeg
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 12em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: mailbox
      text: gdy6666662021@163.com
      href: mailto:gdy6666662021@163.com
    - icon: github
      text: ngdewanyi
      href: https://github.com/ngdewanyi
    - icon: solid user
      text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/
    - icon: 📝
      text: CV
      href: CV.pdf  
---

::: {#hero-heading}

I am an undergraduate student at Ocean University of China, majoring in Accounting (ACCA Direction) at the College of Management. My research interests lie in corporate governance, state-owned enterprise (SOE) reform, and ESG performance. I am currently working under the supervision of Associate Professor Ma Xinxiao in the Qingmiao Studio, focusing on strategic alliance networks and their impact on corporate behavior.

My work employs empirical methods to examine how institutional arrangements—such as property rights reform and strategic alliances—shape firm outcomes including innovation, investment efficiency, and sustainability practices.

## Education

- **B.A. in Accounting (ACCA Direction)** | Ocean University of China, College of Management  
  September 2023 – June 2027 (Expected)  
  GPA: 3.788 / 4.0  
  GRE: V 162 / Q 170 / AW 3.5

## Research Experience

- **Qingmiao Studio**, supervised by Associate Prof. Ma Xinxiao  
  Department of Accounting, Ocean University of China | March 2023 – Present  
  Collect and process strategic alliance announcement data from multi-source channels; develop classification schemes and ensure coding reliability for empirical analysis.

## Honors & Awards

- National Scholarship, Ministry of Education, 2024
- First Prize Scholarship, Ocean University of China, 2024

:::
